completeness.notes: Spec mirrors the locally-running Delta RFQ Arena backend (default http://localhost:3335, override via DELTA_RFQ_API_URL). No public OpenAPI exists upstream and no public docs URL was found, so the spec was reverse-engineered from the hand-written Rust client and serde types. No auth is declared on the wire today. Loose/opaque fields modelled as `additionalProperties: true`: Quote.local_law, FillResponse.error, FillResponse.receipt, FillResponse.proof — internal shapes are unstable across backend versions. Component names avoid *Type/*Status/*Kind to dodge progenitor inline-enum collisions.
